title: One hospitalization and twenty-five new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta March 3
summary: On March 3, YKHC reports one in-region hospitalization and twenty-five new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: Proposal Solicitation for Farm Manager Contracted Position at Pilgrim Hot Springs
summary: As a co-managing owner of Unaatuq, LLC for Pilgrim Hot Springs Kawerak, Inc. is soliciting Proposals for the contracted position of a Farm Manager for Pilgrim Hot Springs. title: Courtland Pannebaker at Kawerak Gambell Head Start Earns AHSA 2021 Teacher of the Year
summary: Kawerak is proud to share in the celebration of our Gambell Head Start Teacher, Courtland Pannebaker. Courtland was nominated by Lucas Aningayou for the 2021 Alaska Head Start Association Teacher of the Year Award, and he was selected for the award! title: The Task of Relocating an Entire City
summary: The 2021 book Valdez Rises, by Tabitha Gregory, details the monumental task of relocating the city after the 1964 earthquake. The post The Task of Relocating an Entire City appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
